shortDescription: Stunning fully renovated 4-bedroom detached home in The Beaches with modern finishes and a sun-drenched south-facing garden.
fullDescription: This beautifully renovated detached home sits on a tree-lined street in one of Toronto's most coveted neighbourhoods. The open-concept main floor features hardwood floors throughout, a chef's kitchen with quartz countertops and premium stainless-steel appliances, and a spacious living room with a wood-burning fireplace. Upstairs you'll find four generous bedrooms including a primary suite with walk-in closet and luxurious ensuite. The finished basement offers a recreation room, additional bathroom, and ample storage. Step outside to a professionally landscaped backyard with a large deck perfect for entertaining. Minutes from Queen Street East shops, Kew Gardens, and the boardwalk.
keyFeatures: Renovated chef's kitchen with quartz countertops
Walking distance to beach and boardwalk
